Store: 1000 Hampton

Insights:

In 2024, 1000 Hampton decreased revenue by -5.4% vs previous year, and orders declined -7.9% YoY.
In 2025, 1000 Hampton decreased revenue by -7% vs previous year, and orders declined -5.8% YoY.
